Tungsten Automation recognized as a Leader in the first Gartner® IDP Magic Quadrant™.

# TotalAgility:

Advance from Documents to Decisions

Today’s enterprises are overwhelmed by content—some flooding in by the minute, others buried in archives for years—but most solutions solve only part of the problem. TotalAgility advances beyond those limits, empowering changemakers to take command of all information, wherever it lives—transforming complex unstructured content into actionable insights that give teams the clarity to move faster, the confidence to decide smarter, and the freedom to focus on what matters most.

## Analyst recognition that reinforces results

### A Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Intelligent Document Processing

Tungsten Automation was recognized as a Leader in the inaugural Gartner Magic Quadrant™ for Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) solutions. Learn how Tungsten is positioned in the Leaders’ Quadrant for its Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute.

## Frequently Asked Questions

AI workflow automation allows you to complete a sequence of tasks using AI to achieve a specific goal. For example, you may use AI workflow automation to:

- Gather and analyze data
- Create personalized marketing material
- Respond to customer service queries

TotalAgility is Tungsten’s AI workflow tool. It features a simple and easy to use interface. Any team member can easily use this tool to boost productivity and gain deeper insights using data.

There are three key components of an AI workflow: data, algorithms, and integration and output.

**Data**is the backbone of AI systems — whether you’re creating personalized marketing emails for thousands of customers or using AI to uncover business insights.**Algorithms**determine what happens to your data, making them a key component of AI workflows.- Finally, AI systems need to be
**integrated into your business so you can leverage the output**.

All of these components are simplified within Tungsten TotalAgility, giving you the power to do more in less time.

Tungsten’s AI workflow automation blends generative AI, document processing, and process orchestration to automate your workflows and deliver real-time business insights. Thanks to TotalAgility, you can streamline operations, boost productivity, enhance experiences, and improve financial performance.

TotalAgility automates workflows across industries, including:

For even wider-reaching solutions, explore the Tungsten Marketplace. Discover a wide range of pre-built solutions to broaden TotalAgility’s application. Deploy TotalAgility in a public or private cloud or on-premises to adapt to your business environment.

Unlock the power of:

**Advanced artificial intelligence**: Boost proficiency and efficiency with advanced AI and generative AI capabilities guided by ethical AI principles and stringent security measures.**End-to-end automation**: Lower cost of ownership and improve employee experience with end-to-end automation powered by intelligent document processing, process orchestration, and generative AI.**Integrated business system**: Connect and sync diverse systems for smooth and streamlined workflows. Extend capabilities even further with pre-built solutions from the Tungsten Marketplace.

AI workflow automation tools can benefit a range of different industries, including:

- Human resources
- Healthcare
- Banking and financial institutions
- Supply chain
- Insurance
- Public sector

TotalAgility improves productivity by taking a range of daily workflows off your plate. Thanks to TotalAgility, you can automate many of your repetitive or time-consuming processes and free up time to focus on projects that further your business. It can also minimize mistakes associated with human error, eliminating the need to redo tasks. Businesses who adopt TotalAgility experience significant gains in employee productivity and proficiency.

Ready to learn what TotalAgility can do for your business? Request a demo today. Your dedicated Tungsten rep will learn about your business and the issues you face and show you how TotalAgility can create automated workflows to save you time and money.
